description: Tracks current stock levels, par levels, and usage patterns for all items. Updated by POS-driven depletion (Blueprint 3.1), receiving workflow 05, and par-level monitoring workflow 06.

fields.name: SKU
fields.description: Unique stock keeping unit code. Primary identifier.

fields.name: Item Name
fields.description: Human-readable item name.

fields.name: Category
fields.description: Product category for GL mapping and reporting.

fields.name: Department
fields.description: Primary department that uses/consumes this item.

fields.name: UOM
fields.description: Unit of measure for stock tracking.

fields.name: Current Stock
fields.description: Current quantity on hand. Updated by POS sales (depletion) and receiving (addition). Maps to 'current_stock' in workflow 04.

fields.name: Par Level
fields.description: Target minimum stock level. Auto-reorder triggered when Current Stock < Par Level (Blueprint 5F).

fields.name: Max Level
fields.description: Maximum desired stock level (to prevent over-ordering).

fields.name: Reorder Point
fields.description: Stock level that triggers reorder alert (usually same as Par Level).

fields.name: Reorder Qty
fields.description: Suggested quantity to order when reordering.

fields.name: Pending Orders
fields.description: Quantity on open POs not yet received. Prevents double-ordering.

fields.name: Available Stock
fields.description: Calculated: Current Stock + Pending Orders. Shows total available.

fields.name: Avg Daily Usage
fields.description: 7-day rolling average daily consumption. Calculated from POS sales data (Blueprint 3.3).

fields.name: Days of Stock
fields.description: Calculated days remaining at current usage rate.

options.formula: IF({Avg Daily Usage} > 0, {Current Stock} / {Avg Daily Usage}, 999)

fields.name: Stock Status
fields.description: Visual indicator: Critical (below par), Low, or OK.

options.formula: IF({Current Stock} <= 0, '🔴 OUT', IF({Current Stock} < {Par Level}, '🟡 LOW', '✅ OK'))

fields.name: Below Par
fields.description: Checkbox for filtering items needing reorder.

fields.name: Tracked by POS
fields.description: Whether this item has recipe-level tracking via POS (vs manual count).

fields.name: Recipe Items
fields.description: For POS-tracked items: JSON of menu items and ingredient quantities per serving.

fields.name: Last Received Date
fields.description: Most recent delivery date. Updated by workflow 05.

fields.name: Last Delivery ID
fields.description: Reference to last delivery record.

fields.name: Vendor
fields.description: Preferred vendor for this item.

fields.name: Contract Price
fields.description: Current contracted unit price from vendor.

fields.name: Last Count Date
fields.description: Date of last physical inventory count (for manual-count items).

fields.name: Active
fields.description: Whether item is currently in use.

fields.name: Notes
fields.description: Special handling notes, storage requirements, etc.

views.name: Below Par - Reorder Needed
views.description: Items at or below par level requiring reorder. Primary view for auto-reorder workflow.

views.name: POS-Tracked Items
views.description: Items with automatic POS depletion tracking.

views.name: By Category
views.description: Grouped by category for spend analysis.
